task_name: Document Post Phase Scanner MVP Checkpoint
goal: Document the post-Phase-Scanner MVP checkpoint and identify the next non-live Scope Resolver boundary before Builder task creation.
claims: BP-043 documents that Phase Scanner local deterministic review coverage is complete by current coverage map.
BP-043 identifies Scope Resolver handoff as the next MVP chain boundary.
BP-043 does not authorize live Builder calls, auth, secrets, DB, deploy, execution, or task creation.
assumptions: The current Phase Scanner coverage map reports no documented fixture gap.
The next MVP chain step after Phase Scanner is Scope Resolver.
A planning checkpoint is safer than jumping directly to Builder task creation.
dod: The document states what is complete, what is not complete, and the next boundary.
The document explicitly blocks live Builder, auth, secrets, DB, deploy, execution, and task creation.
stop_conditions: Runtime, fixture, package, or tool changes become necessary
Live Builder, auth, secrets, DB, deploy, execution, or task creation becomes necessary
prior_task_findings: BP-041 and BP-042 closed and enforced the currently documented Phase Scanner fixture coverage gap state.
